title: Standard Low-Risk Service Release Strategy
prompt: Read `./ci-cd-release-summary.md` and `./low-risk-service-release.md`. Work only from those files. Do not ask follow-up questions. If you need assumptions, state them briefly and continue. Choose the deployment strategy for this low-risk service release, including rollout pattern, verification checks, ownership, and rollback steps. Keep the answer specific to the supplied release and avoid generic deployment advice.

assertions.name: chooses-proportionate-rollout
assertions.description: Uses a low-friction rollout pattern appropriate for a low-risk release

assertions.name: defines-basic-verification
assertions.description: Includes smoke or health checks before full traffic exposure

assertions.name: keeps-rollback-concrete
assertions.description: Describes a specific rollback path rather than a vague fallback

assertions.name: stays-release-specific
assertions.description: Keeps the rollout plan tied to the supplied release context instead of generic guidance

title: Brownfield Staged Rollout Strategy
prompt: Read `./ci-cd-release-summary.md` and `./brownfield-staged-rollout.md`. Work only from those files. Do not ask follow-up questions. If you need assumptions, state them briefly and continue. Choose the deployment strategy for this brownfield release, including rollout pattern, verification checkpoints, stop conditions, ownership, and rollback path. Keep the answer specific to the supplied release and avoid defaulting to a full cutover.

assertions.name: classifies-brownfield-risk
assertions.description: Recognizes the release as staged-risk or similarly constrained brownfield delivery

assertions.name: chooses-staged-rollout
assertions.description: Selects canary or staged expansion instead of a direct full cutover

assertions.name: defines-stop-gates
assertions.description: Adds explicit verification and stop/continue gates before expanding traffic

assertions.name: preserves-rollback-readiness
assertions.description: Keeps rollback speed and ownership explicit in the rollout plan
